task: Phase 03 — Auth: next-auth v5 credentials, bcryptjs hashing, ADMIN/STAFF role gating (src/proxy.ts + server-side requireAuth), admin user management, login lockout, seeded admin.
why: Introduces the app's authentication + authorization boundary and secret management (AUTH_SECRET, password hashes). A gap here is an elevation/impersonation risk, so a STRIDE-driven evidence pack + independent EVL re-run are required before finalize.
